installCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend install; else echo "No package.json found" >&2; exit 1; fi'
buildCommand: sh -c 'if [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build; elif [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm --prefix frontend run build; else echo "No package.json found" >&2; exit 1; fi'
